metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced programming skills including object-oriented design, data structures, algorithms, and software engineering practices. This course culminates in a capstone project demonstrating programming mastery and professional software development practices.
metadata.general_description: Advanced OOP, data structures, algorithms, software engineering, and capstone project development.

big_ideas.statement: Software design patterns and object-oriented principles enable creation of maintainable, scalable applications
big_ideas.elaboration: Professional software development uses proven design patterns and architecture to manage complexity and enable long-term maintenance.

big_ideas.statement: Data structures and algorithms determine software efficiency and effectiveness in solving problems
big_ideas.elaboration: Choosing appropriate data structures and algorithms is critical for creating efficient, performant software solutions.

big_ideas.statement: Software engineering practices ensure code quality, reliability, and collaborative development
big_ideas.elaboration: Professional development requires version control, testing, documentation, and collaborative processes.

big_ideas.statement: Complex projects require planning, design, and systematic development to achieve successful outcomes
big_ideas.elaboration: Large projects demand careful planning, iterative development, testing, and communication with stakeholders.

i_can_statements: I can design class hierarchies and inheritance structures
I can apply SOLID principles to design
I can design polymorphic and abstract systems
I can plan refactoring and design improvements

competencies.raw: Design data structures for specific problems and contexts
i_can_statements: I can select appropriate data structures
I can design custom data structures
I can analyze time and space complexity
I can optimize for performance requirements

competencies.raw: Design algorithms to solve computational problems efficiently
i_can_statements: I can design algorithms for common problems
I can select appropriate algorithmic approaches
I can analyze and improve algorithm efficiency
I can adapt algorithms for specific contexts

competencies.raw: Design capstone projects demonstrating programming mastery
i_can_statements: I can define ambitious project scope and objectives
I can design system architecture and components
I can plan implementation and timeline
I can design for extensibility and maintenance

competencies.raw: Apply object-oriented programming principles in code
i_can_statements: I can implement classes with appropriate encapsulation
I can implement inheritance and polymorphism
I can use design patterns effectively
I can refactor code to improve design

competencies.raw: Apply data structures and algorithms correctly
i_can_statements: I can implement and use standard data structures
I can implement custom data structures
I can implement efficient algorithms
I can analyze and optimize performance

competencies.raw: Apply software engineering and testing practices
i_can_statements: I can write clean, maintainable code
I can write unit and integration tests
I can use version control effectively
I can debug and troubleshoot problems

competencies.raw: Apply planning and project management to large projects
i_can_statements: I can plan and scope projects systematically
I can break projects into manageable tasks
I can manage time and resources
I can communicate progress and challenges

competencies.raw: Use integrated development environments and tools effectively
i_can_statements: I can use IDEs and code editors
I can use debugging and profiling tools
I can use build automation tools
I can customize development environments

competencies.raw: Use version control and collaboration tools
i_can_statements: I can use Git for version control
I can collaborate on shared codebases
I can manage branches and merges
I can use code review and collaboration platforms

competencies.raw: Use testing and continuous integration frameworks
i_can_statements: I can use testing frameworks and libraries
I can write and run automated tests
I can set up continuous integration
I can use test coverage tools

competencies.raw: Use frameworks and libraries to accelerate development
i_can_statements: I can evaluate and select frameworks
I can use web and application frameworks
I can leverage libraries and APIs
I can integrate third-party components

areas.name: Object-Oriented Programming and Design Patterns
topics: Design patterns: Singleton, Factory, Observer, etc.
SOLID principles and design best practices
